scripts.dev:clean: npm run stop:dev && sleep 1 && rm -rf .next && next dev --turbopack
scripts.prebuild: pgrep -f 'next dev' >/dev/null 2>&1 && (echo '' && echo 'Stop dev server first (Ctrl+C), then run build again.' && echo '' && exit 1) || exit 0
scripts.build:clean: npm run stop:dev && rm -rf .next && next build
scripts.build:pages:clean: npm run stop:dev && rm -rf .next out && GITHUB_PAGES=true next build
